description: converse refuses to be stereotyped as the brand that only makes canvas shoes. This pair of flip flops celebrates summer with its colour happy tones on the footbed. Wear this with any off-duty ensemble to snazz up your outfit. Upper Rubber thong style straps with branding Rubber toe separator Rubber footbed with printed branding along its length Outsole Rubber outsole with terraced grooved Slipper care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
